createTagModal.title: Create a tag
createTagModal.maxLengthHint: The tag name can be up to 10 characters long
createTagModal.duplicateHint: Names that are already in use cannot be registered

withdrawal.title: Withdraw
withdrawal.guideTitle: Are you no longer using Timo?
withdrawal.guideDescription: After withdrawal, your account information and all saved data will be deleted and cannot be recovered.
withdrawal.warningSchedule: Saved schedules and tasks will be deleted.
withdrawal.warningCalendar: The linked calendar connection will be disconnected.
withdrawal.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to withdraw? All your data will be deleted and cannot be undone.

Toast.tagLimit: You can create up to <blue>8 tags</blue>, and to add more, please delete existing tags.
Toast.todoLimitLine1: You can add up to <blue>20 incomplete to-dos</blue>.
Toast.todoLimitLine2: To add a new to-do, please complete an existing one.
Toast.onboardingSubmitFailed: Failed to save onboarding. Please try again.

Login.headline: Manage your day with clear timeboxes.
Login.description: Please log in to your timo account.
Login.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to the timo <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

Error.title: A problem has occurred.
Error.description: We are currently undergoing maintenance for a better experience. Please try again later.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: You may have entered an invalid address or used an incorrect path.

GlobalError.title: An issue has occurred.
GlobalError.description: Please try again later or go back to home.

language.title: Please select a language to use.
language.description:
timo will be displayed in your selected language.
You can change it later in settings.

timePrediction.title: Do you estimate your time well?

4.label: Very accurate.
4.sublabel: The estimated time matches the actual time.

lifePattern.title: Set your wake-up and bedtime.
lifePattern.description: The information you provide will only be used for time pattern analysis.
lifePattern.bedTimeError: Please set different times for bedtime and wake-up.

calendarConnect.title: Connect your Google Calendar.
calendarConnect.description: You can import your existing schedules into timo and manage them in one place.
calendarConnect.consentNotice: Clicking will display the Google authentication and calendar access permission screen.
calendarConnect.permissionNotice: timo only requests permission to view your schedules.

stopModal.title: Shall we stop now?
stopModal.description: The <blue>{minutes}</blue> completed so far will be recorded in the timebox.

completeModal.title: The task has been completed!
completeModal.defaultFeedback: You've completed this task. Great work!

extendModal.title: How much time would you like to add?

Focus.empty: No to-dos to focus on right now
